task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoServer 'New Style' or 'Edit Style' page, the 'Name' field is filled with 'river_buffer'.

task_completion.description: SLD includes a dynamic buffer function with a distance of 0.1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SLD text editor, look for a <Geometry> tag containing a buffer function (e.g., <ogc:Function name="buffer">) with a distance value of 0.1.

task_completion.description: SLD includes a red fill with 0.5 opacity in a PolygonSymbolizer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SLD text editor, look for a <PolygonSymbolizer> containing fill color '#FF0000' and fill-opacity '0.5' (usually in <CssParameter> or <SvgParameter> tags).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the publishing settings of the 'ne:ne_rivers' layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GeoServer 'Edit Layer' page for 'ne_rivers' is open, specifically on the 'Publishing' tab.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'river_buffer' style to the 'ne:ne_rivers' layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Publishing' tab of the layer settings, 'river_buffer' is selected in the 'Default Style' dropdown or is present in the 'Available Styles' list.

integrity.description: The agent used the GeoServer web administration interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GeoServer web interface (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/) being used, not just terminal commands or API requests.

integrity.description: The agent edited the SLD within the GeoServer style editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SLD XML code is visible inside the GeoServer style editor text area, not just in a local text editor like nano or VS Code.

integrity.description: The agent used SLD dynamic rendering for the buffer, not pre-processing the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The buffer is achieved via SLD <ogc:Function name="buffer"> rather than running SQL or QGIS to create a new buffered shapefile/table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an SLD style named 'river_buffer'. The SLD must use a <PolygonSymbolizer> with a dynamic buffer function (distance 0.1) and styling properties: fill '#FF0000' and opacity 0.5. This style must be assigned to the 'ne:ne_rivers' layer in GeoServer.
